checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a deterministic specbridge-artifact-inventory command that reports .specbridge evidence families with counts, bytes, latest modified timestamps, retention posture, cleanup permission, totals, and retention_enforcement=none.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command is registered, emits valid JSON, includes the required family fields and totals, is read-only without -OutputPath, writes only .specbridge/artifact-inventory/current.inventory.json when requested, requires -Force for replacement, and is documented with explicit no-delete/no-archive/no-prune/no-compress/no-move behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are inside the issue-209 exclusive_write scope. The implementation does not touch workflows, env files, secrets, dependencies, network behavior, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, operator decisions, issue #194, or digital twin work.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command uses repository path normalization, writes only the governed inventory artifact when explicitly requested, and performs no retention enforcement or destructive artifact operations.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The changed source, docs, dashboard, state, inventory, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit files are all declared in issue-209 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The CLI regression suite includes artifact inventory coverage for command shape, required family IDs, required fields, totals, retention_enforcement, no mutation without -OutputPath, output artifact writing, -Force replacement behavior, and bad OutputPath rejection. Final validation rerun is recorded in the audit packet.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validation evidence is tracked in the audit packet. GitHub CI remains the authoritative remote gate after PR creation.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, local validation status, policy result, risk result, unresolved CI and closure risks, merge status, deployment status, and completion status.

findings.evidence: The artifact inventory surface explicitly documents that it does not delete, archive, prune, compress, or move artifacts.
findings.recommendation: Keep retention enforcement disabled unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI pending until PR creation.
Post-merge closure still required after primary merge.
